title: 2026 Golden Globe Awards: Full List of Winners
text: At the 2026 Golden Globe Awards (83rd annual ceremony), Hamnet won Best Motion Picture – Drama. The film was directed by Chloé Zhao, who appeared stunned upon hearing the announcement. The movie also featured Jessie Buckley, who won Best Performance by a Female Actor in a Motion Picture – Drama for her role in the film. The ceremony took place on January 11, 2026, and recognized achievements across film and television.
